info.title: Host-to-host API
info.description:
Server-to-server API for merchants that need direct control over payment creation, callbacks, refunds, payouts, and payment status checks.

**Base URL**

`https://api.platform.dev`

**You need before start**

- `project_id`
- `secret_key`
- backend callback URL
- server-side signature generation

**Start here**

- [Quickstart](/gate/gate-quickstart)
- [Basic implementation](/gate/gate-quickstart-basic-implementation)
- [Signature generation](/gate/signature-gate)

**First endpoint to try**

`POST /v2/payment/card/sale`

**Important rule**

Build the full payload first, generate `general.signature` last, and treat callbacks as the source of the final payment result.

post.description:
* Request for full or partial refund to the customer's card.
* Refund is requested in the same currency that the payment was performed.
* The refund amount can be less than or equal to the amount of the initial payment. The partial refund amount is specified in the parameter  `amount`.
* If the refund amount is not specified in the request, the full amount of the initial payment is refunded

payment_id.description: Identifier of the payment, case-insensitive, must be unique within the project. In the payment platform, identifiers `order_314` and `Order_314` are treated as a single identifier. Any letters, digits, and symbols in UTF-8 encoding can be used, except when certain characters occur at the beginning and/or at the end of the string. These characters include a space, a horizontal tab, a null byte, a vertical tab, a newline/line feed, and a carriage return

ProviderResultInfo.description: Object that contains payment provider information about the operation result

AvsInfo.description: Object that contains customer details for verification with the Address Verification Service. For more information, see [AVS Check](https://developers.platform.dev/en/en_gate_avs.html)

StoredCardType.description: Parameter indicating how customer's card credencials are stored on merchant side. For more information, see [COF purchases](https://developers.platform.dev/en/en_gate__payments_on_saved_data.html)

code.description: Unified error code for operation processing

message.description: Message that clarifies the cause of the error

field.description: Parameter or object name in the request that is missing or where the error is found

constraint.description: Validation type of field value with the error

ErrorItem.description: Object that contains single error information

errors.description: Array that contains information of one or more error messages

ErrorItems.description: Object that contains information of one or more error messages

next_retry_date.description: Next retry operation will be on the specified date

Any letters, digits, and symbols in UTF-8 encoding can be used, except when certain characters occur at the beginning and/or at the end of the string. These characters include a space, a horizontal tab, a null byte, a vertical tab, a newline/line feed, and a carriage return

id.description: Unique identification of the payment in the payment platform

date.description: Date and time when the payment status was last updated in the payment platform in the format according to ISO 8601 standart

description.description: Description of the payment passed in the initial request

method.description: Payment method that used to perform the payment

operations.description: List of operations performed within the payment

recurring.description: Object that contains recurring registration details of the payment. Details is submitted if the initial request for payment is passed with `recurring_registration=1` and the payment is successfully processed

id.description: Identifier of the recurring payment in the payment platform

currency.description: Payment currency in ISO 4217 alpha-3 format

valid_thru.description: Expiration date of the recurring payment performing

account.description: Object that contains customer's payment instrument (card, bank account, wallet, etc.) details

card_holder.description: Cardholder name (as specified on the card)

token_created_at.description: Date and time of the token generation in the format according to ISO 8601 standart

acs.description: Object that contains 3-D Secure data in case the card requires 3-D Secure authentication

md.description: Merchant data in the payment system. The content of this field is passed unchanged and without assumptions about its content to the return POST

acs_url.description: Issuer URL for redirection of customers

signature.description: Digital signature generated on the basis of response parameters by using the project secret key

PaymentStatusResponse.description: Object that contains the payment details passed to the request for payment status clarifying

id.description: Unique identifier of the customer in merchant project

country.description: Customer country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format

phone.description: Phone number of the customer that must have from 4 to 24 digits

home_phone.description: Home phone number of the customer that must have from 4 to 24 digits

work_phone.description: Work phone number of the customer that must have from 4 to 24 digits

save.description: Parameter that indicates whether the customer's payment instrument details should be saved

account_save.description: Parameter that indicates whether the customer's account details must be saved

day_of_birth.description: Customer day of birth in DD-MM-YYYY format

datetime.description: Date and time of Payment Widget widget opening

language.description: Customer language with localization, for example en_US

zip.description: Postal zip code of customer address

account_id.description: Customer identifier in external payment system that is used for payment performing

qq_account_number.description: Customer login in QQ social network

ssn.description: The last 4 digits of the US social security number

identify.description: Object that contains customer identification document details

doc_issue_date.description: Date of issue of identification document

doc_issue_country.description: Country of the identification document issuing

billing.description: Object contains customer billing address details

country.description: Country of the customer billing address in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format

region.description: The region or state of the customer billing address

region_code.description: The region or state of the customer billing address in ISO 3166-2 format. For example, CA in US or ON for Canada.

city.description: City of the customer billing address

address.description: Address of the customer billing address

postal.description: Postal code of the customer billing address

color_depth.description: Browser color depth in bits per pixel.

java_enabled.description: A flag indicating whether the buyer's browser is capable of running Java.

js_enabled.description: A flag indicating whether the buyer's browser is capable of executing JavaScript.

timezone_offset.description: Time difference between UTC time and buyer's browser time. Time in minutes. Example: "-110"

timezone_name.description: The name of the buyer's browser timezone. Example: "Europe/London"

address_match.description: Indicator of coincidence of the billing address with the delivery address.

accept_language_header.description: Indicates the preferred language(s) of the customer's browser, derived from the Accept-Language HTTP header, for example `en-GB,en;q=0.8,fr;q=0.3`

CustomerInfoBase.description: Object that contains customer details without ip_address. Use CustomerInfo instead of this

descriptor.description: Merchant descriptor, i.e. a company’s name or other additional information provided by the merchant (customer ID, phone number, location information, etc.). In case of card payments, the merchant descriptor is sent to the issuing bank and is shown on the customer’s bank statement

data.description: Information about the payment provided by the merchant. Can include details about the purchased items or services (number, description, SKU, etc.) or any other relevant data. This information is not sent to the payment provider or other third parties and is used at the merchant’s discretion

MerchantInfo.description: Object that contains additional information provided by the merchant

CustomerInfo.description: Object that contains full customer details

CustomerInfoCard.description: Object that contains full customer details

card_product_type.description: Card product type: business or individual

id.description: Unique identifier of the customer in your project

country.description: customer country in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format

phone.description: Phone number of the customer that must have from 4 to 24 digits

day_of_birth.description: customer day of birth must have format DD-MM-YYYY

ssn.description: The last 4 digits of the social security number of US.

region.description: The region or state of the customer's billing address

city.description: City of the billing customer address

address.description: Street account address of the customer

postal.description: Postal code of the billing address of the customer

accept_language_header.description: Indicates the preferred language(s) of the customer's browser, derived from the Accept-Language HTTP header, for example `en-GB,en;q=0.8,fr;q=0.3`

CustomerInfoInvoice.description: Object that contains information about the customer

day_of_birth.description: Sender day of birth must have format DD-MM-YYYY

phone.description: Phone number of the sender that must have from 4 to 24 digits

residence.description: Residence country of the sender's billing address in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format

citizenship.description: Citizenship country of the sender's billing address in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format

person_type.description: Sender person type like Company, Individual etc.

identify.description: Object that contains sender's identification details

doc_issue_date.description: Date of issue of identity document

country.description: Country of the sender's billing address in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format

city.description: City of the billing sender address

address.description: Street account address of the sender

postal.description: Postal code of the billing address of the sender

country.description: Sender country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format

SenderInfo.description: Object that contains information about the sender

id.description: Unique identifier of the customer in merchant project

change_date.description: Date last change account without clear or change password. Format: DD-MM-YYYY

pass_change_date.description: Date clear or change password. Format: DD-MM-YYYY

purchase_number.description: The number of purchases from this user account in the last 6 months

provision_attempts.description: The number of attempts to add a new card in your account in the last 24 hours

activity_day.description: The number of attempts to make payments from this account in the last 24 hours

activity_year.description: The number of attempts to make payments from this account in the last 365 days

payment_age.description: The date the user linked the card to their account. Format: DD-MM-YYYY

suspicious_activity.description: The presence of noticed suspicious activity in this account

auth_method.description: The method used by the user to authorize on the merchant's site

auth_time.description: The date the user linked the card to their account. Format: DD-MM-YYYYHH:MM

age_indicator.description: Length of time that the cardholder has had the account with the 3DS Requestor. Format and values according to EMVCo specification

change_indicator.description: Length of time since the cardholder’s account information with the 3DS Requestor was last changed. Including Billing or Shipping address, new payment account, or new user(s) added.

pass_change_indicator.description: Length of time since the cardholder’s account with the 3DS Requestor had a password change or account reset.

payment_age_indicator.description: Indicates the length of time that the payment account was enrolled in the cardholder’s account with the 3DS Requestor.

AccountInfoAtMerchant.description: An object that contains account data in merchant system.

expiry_year.description: Year of expiration of the recurring payments performing

expiry_month.description: Month of expiration of the recurring payments performing

expiry_day.description: Day of expiration of the recurring payments performing

interval.description: The interval between regular payments (in units specified in the **period** parameter)

amount.description: Amount of payment in minor currency units

period.description: The period of a regular payment performing

time.description: The time of a regular payment performing in the format hh:mm:ss (UTC0)

register.description: Parameter that indicates whether this payment should be registered as recurring

scheduled_payment_id.description: Next recurring payment identifier. Obligatory when used with **recurring.start_date** parameter. Applicable only when **recurring.type = R** and **recurring.period** is set. Is used to authorize and perform the next recurring payment

start_date.description: First automatic payment date and time in format **DD-MM-YYYY**. Obligatory when scheduled_payment_id is set. Applicable only when **recurring.type = R** and **recurring.period** is set. Is used to authorize and perform the next recurring payment. **start_date** can't be less than the response date of the initial *sale/auth* request within which the recurring was registered

RecurringInfo.description: Object that contains recurring payment details and conditions

id.description: Unique identifier of the recurring payment in the payment platform

RecurringIdInfo.description: Object that contains recurring payment identifier

id.description: Unique identifier of the recurring payment in the payment platform

expiry_year.description: Year of expiration of the recurring payment performing

expiry_month.description: Month of expiration of the recurring payment performing

expiry_day.description: Day of expiration of the recurring payment performing

interval.description: The interval between regular payments (in units specified in the **period** parameter)

amount.description: Amount of payment in minor currency units

period.description: The period of a regular payment performing

time.description: The time of a regular payment performing in the format hh:mm:ss (UTC0)

scheduled_payment_id.description: Next recurring trpayment identifier. Obligatory when used with **recurring.start_date** parameter. Applicable only when **recurring.type = R** and **recurring.period** is set. Is used to authorize and perform the next recurring payment

start_date.description: First automatic payment date and time in format **DD-MM-YYYY**. Obligatory when scheduled_payment_id is set. Applicable only when **recurring.type = R** and **recurring.period** is set. Is used to authorize and perform the next recurring payment. **start_date** can't be less than the response date of the initial *sale/auth* request within which the recurring was registered

RecurringUpdateInfo.description: Object that contains updating recurring payment details

id.description: Interface type which is used for payment performing: 7 - Payment Widget in iframe mode

quantity.description: Quantity of the goods or servies

ReceiptPositionData.description: Object that contains single position details to be sent to customer in receipt after payment performing

ReceiptData.description: Object that contains details to be sent to customer in receipt after payment performing

delay.description: Delay time for callback sending in seconds

force_disable.description: Parameter that disables sending callbacks (true or false value is available)

CallbackInfo.description: Object that contains additional callback sending conditions

AddendumInitial.description: Available only if MCC is 3501-3999 or 7011

customer_service_toll_free_number.description: Service phone number to address customer questions and disputes

folio_number.description: Internal invoice, booking or billing reference number of card acceptor

tax.description: Tax amount information such as the daily room tax, occupancy tax, energy tax, and tourist tax amounts

rate.description: Daily room charges exclusive of taxes and fees

number_of_nights.description: Total number of nights for which room was contracted during lodging stay

fire_safety_act_indicator.description: Facility complies with the Hotel and Motel Fire Safety Act of 1990 (PL101-391) or similar legislation

guest_number.description: Number assigned to the lodging customer

billing_adjustment.description: Additional charges incurred after the cardholder departure

property_phone_number.description: Specific lodging property location by its local phone number

no_show_indicator.description: Customer did not show up after making lodging reservation

prepaid_expenses.description: Amount of deposit or other prepaid amounts for the lodging stay

total_tax.description: Total amount of sales tax or value added tax (VAT) on the total purchase amount

AddendumLodgingInitial.description: Available only if MCC is 3501-3999 or 7011

rate.description: Daily room charges exclusive of taxes and fees

number_of_nights.description: Total number of nights for which a room was contracted during a lodging stay

total_tax.description: Total amount of sales tax or value added tax (VAT) on the total purchase amount

AddendumLodging.description: Available only if MCC is 3501-3999 or 7011

room_service.description: Amount of the room service charges

bar_or_lounge.description: Amount of the lounge or bar charges

conference_room.description: Amount of the charges associated with conference room use

audio_or_visual.description: Amount of the audiovisual equipment charges

internet_access.description: Amount of the Internet access charges

early_departure.description: Amount charged because of early departure

phone.description: Amount of charges for all phone calls

gift_shop.description: Amount of all gift shop and specialty shop charges

valet.description: Charges associated with the use of valet services

business_center.description: Amount charged for business center use and supplies

health_club.description: Amount charged for health club use and supplies

project_id.description: Identifier of merchant project received from Platform

payment_id.description: Identifier of the payment, case-insensitive, must be unique within the project. In the payment platform, identifiers `order_314` and `Order_314` are treated as a single identifier. Any letters, digits, and symbols in UTF-8 encoding can be used, except when certain characters occur at the beginning and/or at the end of the string. These characters include a space, a horizontal tab, a null byte, a vertical tab, a newline/line feed, and a carriage return

signature.description: Digital signature generated on the basis of request parameters by using the project secret key. For more information, see [Signature generation and verification](https://developers.platform.dev/en/en_gate_authentication.html)

MerchantAuthGeneralInfo.description: Object that contains required details of the merchant auth request (customer authentication by the payment system on merchant's request)

address_usage.description: Date this delivery address was used for the first time. Format: DD-MM-YYYY

name_indicator.description: Does the name of the buyer match the name of the recipient

country.description: Country from delivery address  ISO 3166-1 alpha-2

address_usage_indicator.description: Indicates when the shipping address used for this transaction was first used with the 3DS Requestor.

region_code.description: The region or state of the customer billing address in ISO 3166-2 format. For example, CA in US or ON for Canada.

ShippingInfo.description: An object that contains information about delivery

amount.description: Payment amount in minor units of currency

GiftCardInfo.description: An object that contains information about gift card

authentication_flow.description: The indicator of the flow that was used for the customer 3-D Secure 2 authentication within the previous operation

authentication_timestamp.description: Date and time of the previous authentication payment of this user.

MpiResult.description: An object that contains information about previous mpi result

cavv.description: Cardholder authentication verification value (base64 encoded, 20 bytes in a decoded form)

ds_operation_id.description: The unique operation identifier assigned by the Directory Server. Supported for 3D Secure 2

threeds_version.description: The version of the 3D Secure protocol

xid.description: The operation identifier (Base64-encoded, 20 bytes in a decoded form)

enrollement_status.description: The enrollment response from the VERes message from the directory server ('Y','N','U'). Supported for 3D Secure 1

authentication_status.description: Cardholder authentication status. Possible values are: Y – The cardholder successfully authenticated with their card issuer, A – The cardholder authentication was attempted, U – Authentication with the card issuer was unavailable

authentication_flow.description: The indicator of the flow that was used for the customer 3-D Secure 2 authentication on the merchant side within the operation being processed

AuthenticationData.description: Object that contains 3DS  Authentication Data from merchant

anyOf.description: Object that contains the data of the transfer recipient

wallet_owner.description: Name of the recipient wallet owner (first and last name separated by space)

anyOf.description: Object that contains the data of the transfer recipient

card_holder.description: Name of the recipient (as specified on the card)

BookingInfo.description: Object that contains general booking details

firstname.description: The first name of the lead traveller

surname.description: The second name of the lead traveller

email.description: The email of the lead traveller

start_date.description: The start date of the booking, DD-MM-YYYY

end_date.description: The end date of the booking, DD-MM-YYYY

total.description: The total costs of the booking in cents
